chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP D 601 2025 _______________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.3246/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 20.02.2025 Mr. Haider Waheed, advocate alongwith Mr. Muhammad Asad Ashfaq Tola, advocate and Mir Moula Bux Tunio, advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. This Petition was filed by impugning the recovery proceedings initiated by the respondent Department, during the pendency of the appeal before the Appellate Tribunal Inland Revenue, Karachi. The respective learned counsel jointly state that it may be just and proper to dispose of this petition with directions for expeditious conclusion of the appeal, while restraining the recovery of the impugned demand in the interim period. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of by directing the Appellate Tribunal Inland Revenue, Karachi, to decide the pending Appeal expeditiously; preferably within 60 days from the date hereof. However, the respondents shall not take any coercive action against the petitioner, in respect of the impugned demand, till the conclusion of the Appeal. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed application(s). Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
